response.overview: The story of the moth, where Teodora Alonzo's story sparked patriotism and courage from her son, the Philippine National Hero,o Dr. Jose Rizal, as he remembers the story not about the danger of the flame but what it can symbolize to his countrymen.
response.tagline: The story of the moth, where Teodora Alonzo's story sparked patriotism and courage from her son, the Philippine National Hero,o Dr. Jose Riza,l as he remembers the story not about the danger of the flame but what it can symbolize to his countrymen.
response.title: Le Papillon de Nuit
